name: AskGauravAI
product_description: I help D2C founders, brand owners and agencies grow with AI. Two products: an AI marketing-intelligence report, and Grid Control, done-for-you AI content execution. I also educate on AI in marketing as a creator.
hero_products: Reporting Project (AI marketing intelligence): Rs 2.5k-7k. Grid Control (done-for-you AI execution): Rs 30k-50K
industry: AI marketing, Digital/Social media marketing automated with AI
target_audience: D2C founders, e-commerce brand owners, agency owners and solopreneurs running Meta ads — globally, English-speaking. People who need marketing intelligence + execution but don't have a big in-house team.
brand_brief: I pair real, data-backed marketing intelligence (from actual competitor and market scraping — zero guesswork) with done-for-you AI execution. Founder-to-founder, no agency fluff, every output traceable to real data.
primary_bottleneck: No consistent system — brands get run ad-hoc and lose context. Need steady on-brand output and to convert audience into clients for both products.
tone_of_voice: Direct, founder-to-founder, no fluff. Practical and confident — show the work and the data, not hype. Teach by doing, slightly contrarian.
tone_specifics: build, real data not vibes, no fluff, founder-to-founder, show the receipts, execution, intelligence, zero-assumption
what_to_never_say: No fake or unverifiable claims — everything traces to real data. No hype/guru tone, no get-rich-quick, no fear-mongering. No dunking on named people, no politics or religion, no fabricated testimonials or stats.
past_content_worked: Account is set up (2 followers) but 0 posts live yet — starting from zero on content.
brand_architecture: AskGauravAI is Gauravs PARENT personal brand / main page. It introduces Gaurav and, over time, promotes everything built under it: Grid Control (done-for-you AI execution), the Reporting SaaS (AI marketing-intelligence project), building automations, and onboarding brands for social media. Launch/intro content introduces the umbrella + the founder WITHOUT naming sub-products — soft teaser only. Sub-brands are named later, not in intro posts.
positioning_wedge: Equal mix: (1) founder building AI systems in public, (2) real intelligence + done-for-you execution, (3) AI for solo/small D2C teams. Agency/anti-team angle = soft occasional wedge only, never an attack.
